posting.sourceTitle: Thomas Shortman Training, Scholarship & Safety Fund
posting.jobTitle: Multi-Story Window and Building Surface Cleaner Apprentice
posting.sponsorName: Thomas Shortman Training, Scholarship and Safety Fund
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain and submit the application in person at Thomas Shortman Training, Scholarship and Safety Fund during the recruitment period. Applications are distributed first come, first served, and must be completed and returned on-site the same day they are issued.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Thomas Shortman Training, Scholarship and Safety Fund, 25 West 18th Street, 4th Floor, New York, NY 10013
posting.applicationHours: Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 1:00 p.m., during the recruitment period
posting.applicationLimitDetails: Limited-application recruitment. Only 300 applications will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis, and recruitment will run for 10 business days or until 300 applications have been issued, whichever comes first.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various work sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a substance abuse test at the sponsor’s expense after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old. Proof will be required after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED. Proof will be required after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.

Must sign minimum qualification and also sign a statement indicating that the applicant is physically able to perform the work of the trade, including working outside, at heights, attached to a window cleaning safety belt; working off suspended scaffolds at heights of 500 feet or more; having no fear of heights of 500 feet; climbing and working off extension ladders at heights of 50 feet; setting up and taking down six pieces of sectional ladders; and raising and lowering ladders and davits for suspended scaffolds.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various work sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must pass a substance abuse test at the sponsor’s expense after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18 or older, have a high school diploma or equivalent, meet the physical demands of the trade, have reliable transportation, and pass a substance abuse test after selection.
posting.contactName: Thomas Shortman Training, Scholarship and Safety Fund
posting.contactSummary: For further information, contact Thomas Shortman Training, Scholarship and Safety Fund at (212) 388-3729.
